programme.title: How It's Made 25
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The sixteenth series of a program about the production process of objects that surround us.Viewers will see with their own eyes how complex the achievements of modern engineering and technology can be.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The sixteenth series of a program about the production process of objects that surround us.Viewers will see with their own eyes how complex the achievements of modern engineering and technology can be.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators present various types of phenomena and how various celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators present various types of phenomena and how various celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators introduce viewers to various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use innovative animation techniques.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground
programme.desc: Scientist and new technology fanatic Rob Nelson and co-presenter of the programs, geophysicist Stefan Burns will try to discover the greatest secrets of archeology and architecture.They will visit unusual and most often forgotten caves, sewers and chemical laboratories.Viewers will see dark matter detectors and places where lost civilizations once existed.Innovative radars and 3D imaging technology will allow you to recreate the appearance of mysterious undergrounds and reach these dark, hidden, unknown places.Rob and Stefan will thoroughly analyze famous legends, such as the one about a Nazi train full of gold hidden in Poland, or about the lost temple in Jerusalem.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground
programme.desc: Scientist and new technology fanatic Rob Nelson and co-presenter of the programs, geophysicist Stefan Burns will try to discover the greatest secrets of archeology and architecture.They will visit unusual and most often forgotten caves, sewers and chemical laboratories.Viewers will see dark matter detectors and places where lost civilizations once existed.Innovative radars and 3D imaging technology will allow you to recreate the appearance of mysterious undergrounds and reach these dark, hidden, unknown places.Rob and Stefan will thoroughly analyze famous legends, such as the one about a Nazi train full of gold hidden in Poland, or about the lost temple in Jerusalem.

programme.title: Building Germany
programme.desc: Viewers will look at the everyday life of people who work on the largest infrastructure projects in Germany.We will find out what people doing difficult and dangerous jobs do.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure 2
programme.desc: The series shows how treasure hunters find sunken ships.They use a special map that was created by American astronaut Gordon Cooper for many years.

programme.title: The Dino Hunters
programme.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.

programme.title: The Dino Hunters
programme.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified
programme.desc: The series presents the achievements of the famous inventor Nikola Tesla and conspiracy theories regarding his mysterious death.The engineer from Serbia is the author of nearly 300 patents, most of which are still used by people today.His working methods, including the experiments he performed, aroused much controversy, which made him considered an eccentric and dangerous person.When he died unexpectedly in his New York apartment in 1943, his notes on his work were allegedly stolen.This gave rise to numerous conjectures and alleged scenarios of events.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified
programme.desc: The series presents the achievements of the famous inventor Nikola Tesla and conspiracy theories regarding his mysterious death.The engineer from Serbia is the author of nearly 300 patents, most of which are still used by people today.His working methods, including the experiments he performed, aroused much controversy, which made him considered an eccentric and dangerous person.When he died unexpectedly in his New York apartment in 1943, his notes on his work were allegedly stolen.This gave rise to numerous conjectures and alleged scenarios of events.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators present various types of phenomena and how various celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators introduce viewers to various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use innovative animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The program's creators present various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of astronomy.The series will use innovative computer animation techniques.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure: The Hunt For A Secret Fortune
programme.desc: One of the pioneers of the conquest of space, Gordon Cooper, worked secretly on a map of shipwrecks for several decades.This idea was born accidentally, in the 1960s, during a mission whose aim was to search for atomic test sites on Earth carried out by the USSR.Using information he gained while orbiting the Earth, Cooper located over 100 shipwrecks.Already on Earth, he marked them on sea maps and thus a real treasure map was created.It was a secret until 2002.Two years before his death, the sick Cooper left it to a younger colleague, Darrell Miklos, who revealed it years later.The series shows how treasure hunters reach sunken ships and penetrate their interiors.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: The series tells the stories of places where incidents involving extraterrestrials probably occurred.Chuck Zukowski and his team of specialists explain the mysteries related to UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: The series tells the stories of places where incidents involving extraterrestrials probably occurred.Chuck Zukowski and his team of specialists explain the mysteries related to UFOs.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Journalist Paul Beban follows the biggest paranormal mysteries and tries to unravel them.
